desc: Audit curated t6040-bringup vs main src/ for drift, then shape the T6040 m1n1 upstream series (dapf gate, M4 watchdog arm, MCC t6041, cpufreq t6040, PCIe t6040 + Apple-ordered clock gating, kboot t6040 display, pmgr_adt2dt fixes, log-ring guard from ticket 042) with a cover-letter draft; draft only, CJ posts (ROADMAP Upstreaming pending; AGENTS.md m1n1-clean worktree). Baseline update 2026-07-14 (fable): m1n1 main merged origin/main at 16b1f61f (8 upstream commits: chickens_*.c moved to src/chickens/ with src/chickens.c staying put, hv+proxyclient SPRR/GXF/AMX gated on apple_sysregs_unlocked, CPUSTART for T6040=0x88000 upstream via yuka 0ec216de); no overlap with local T6040 commits, build verified on M1 host, NOT rig-tested. The audit must target merged main; yuka's CPUSTART commit already covers the proxyclient hv constant, drop any duplicate from the series. Rebase done 2026-07-14 (fable): t6040-bringup rebased onto upstream/main fd20d7f7 (== the upstream content in merged main), 22/22 commits applied clean, range-diff all content-identical, new tip f0738eee, build verified in m1n1-clean; remaining scope is the drift audit + series shaping + cover letter
author: fable
